description: Workflow for processing user activity data with timestamp addition and supplementary data enrichment
name: activity_tracking_workflow

transitions.description: Add processed timestamp to the activity entity
transitions.end_state_description: Processed timestamp added to the entity
transitions.name: add_processed_timestamp

transitions.description: Add supplementary data to the activity entity asynchronously
transitions.end_state_description: Supplementary data has been added to the entity
transitions.name: add_supplementary_data
